name: Tor
description: Check if IP addresses are Tor exit nodes using the Tor Project's public exit node lists. No authentication required.

integration_id_config.description: Unique identifier for this integration instance

timeout.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds when fetching the Tor exit node list

actions.name: Health Check
actions.description: Test connectivity to the Tor Project exit node list endpoint

actions.name: Lookup IP
actions.description: Check if one or more IP addresses are Tor exit nodes. Accepts a single IP or a comma-separated list.

ip.description: IP address or comma-separated list of IP addresses to check
